title: MIRSeq and RNASeq results and workflow analysis.  Role of microRNAs in flunarizine-mediated neuroprotection of motoneuron disease spinal muscular atrophy
author: Dumont, Florent
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
All raw (count data), processed and R scripts are available to consult results and reproduce analysis for open science community. 
 Raw count data and sample description are available on NCBI GEO with IDs GSE145146 for RNA sequencing and GSE319993 for microRNA sequencing.
